>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/inspect/devices/{deviceId}/telemetry"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the current/last repored Shadow State (telemetry) Data for a specific Device.
